text:
diffusion language model is a generative model that creates text by starting with random noise or discrete tokens and iteratively refines them into a coherent sequence through a denoising process. (扩散语言模型是一种生成模型，它通过从随机噪声或离散令牌开始，并通过去噪过程不断细化， 形成一したしたのあるテキスト列を作成します.)
